title: Auto populate dependencies between items
excerpt: I’m desperately looking for a way to perform a batch dependency action  to create dependencies between items, instead of connecting them one by one. This is unreasonable to be done when having dozens or more  items in a …

posts.author: Dganit (Dganit Sofer Levinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m desperately looking for a way to perform a batch dependency action to create dependencies between items, instead of connecting them one by one. This is unreasonable to be done when having dozens or more items in a project. This is a basic feature in any Project management app. Is it possible there is a way and I missed it?
I would be very glad to receive an advice.

Thanks,
Dganit
